name: bonk-skin
description: Encode, decode, validate, and render bonk.io skins
author: Pixelmelt

scripts.build: bun run build:cjs && bun run build:esm && bun run build:browser-cjs && bun run build:browser-esm && bun run build:node-cjs && bun run build:node-esm && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:cjs: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format cjs --external pixi.js --external @napi-rs/canvas && mv dist/index.js dist/index.cjs
scripts.build:browser-cjs: bun build ./src/index.browser.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format cjs --external pixi.js && mv dist/index.browser.js dist/index.browser.cjs
scripts.build:node-cjs: bun build ./src/index.node.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --external @napi-rs/canvas && mv dist/index.node.js dist/index.node.cjs
